rules.title: Root account has active access keys
rules.remediation: Delete all root account access keys immediately. Use IAM users or roles instead.

rules.title: MFA not enabled for root account
rules.remediation: Enable MFA on the root account using a hardware or virtual MFA device.

rules.title: MFA not enabled for IAM users with console access
rules.remediation: Enable MFA for all IAM users who have console access enabled.

rules.title: Access keys not rotated in 90+ days
rules.remediation: Rotate access keys that are older than 90 days. Create new keys, update applications, and deactivate old keys.

rules.title: IAM password policy does not meet minimum requirements
rules.remediation: Update the IAM password policy to require minimum 14 characters, uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

rules.title: Inline policies attached directly to users
rules.remediation: Remove inline policies from users and attach them to groups or roles instead.

rules.title: Administrator policy attached to user
rules.remediation: Remove AdministratorAccess policy from users. Apply least-privilege policies through groups or roles.

rules.title: Bucket is publicly accessible
rules.remediation: Enable S3 Block Public Access settings on the bucket and remove any public ACLs or bucket policies.

rules.title: Bucket versioning is disabled
rules.remediation: Enable versioning on the S3 bucket to protect against accidental deletions and overwrites.

rules.title: Server-side encryption not enabled
rules.remediation: Enable default server-side encryption (SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS) on the bucket.

rules.title: S3 access logging not enabled
rules.remediation: Enable server access logging on the S3 bucket to track requests.

rules.title: Bucket allows public read access
rules.remediation: Remove public read ACL grants and update the bucket policy to deny public read access.

rules.title: Bucket allows public write access
rules.remediation: Remove public write ACL grants and update the bucket policy to deny public write access.

rules.title: Security group allows unrestricted inbound SSH
rules.remediation: Restrict SSH (port 22) access to specific IP addresses or CIDR blocks. Remove 0.0.0.0/0 inbound rules.

rules.title: Security group allows unrestricted inbound RDP
rules.remediation: Restrict RDP (port 3389) access to specific IP addresses or CIDR blocks. Remove 0.0.0.0/0 inbound rules.

rules.title: Security group allows unrestricted inbound on all ports
rules.remediation: Remove security group rules that allow inbound traffic on all ports from 0.0.0.0/0.

rules.title: Default security group allows inbound/outbound traffic
rules.remediation: Ensure the default security group of every VPC restricts all inbound and outbound traffic.

rules.title: EBS volume not encrypted
rules.remediation: Enable encryption for EBS volumes. Create encrypted snapshots and restore to new encrypted volumes.

rules.title: CloudTrail is not enabled in the account
rules.remediation: Enable CloudTrail in all regions to ensure all API activity is logged.

rules.title: CloudTrail logging is disabled
rules.remediation: Re-enable logging on the CloudTrail trail to resume audit logging.

rules.title: CloudTrail log file validation not enabled
rules.remediation: Enable log file validation on CloudTrail to detect unauthorized modifications to log files.

rules.title: CloudTrail not logging to S3 with encryption
rules.remediation: Configure CloudTrail to deliver logs to an S3 bucket with SSE-KMS encryption enabled.

rules.title: KMS key rotation not enabled
rules.remediation: Enable automatic key rotation for all customer-managed KMS keys.

rules.title: KMS key pending deletion
rules.remediation: Cancel the scheduled deletion of KMS keys that are still in use by other resources.

rules.title: VPC flow logs not enabled
rules.remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs for all VPCs to monitor network traffic.

rules.title: Default VPC in use
rules.remediation: Create custom VPCs with proper network segmentation instead of using the default VPC.

rules.title: Network ACL allows unrestricted ingress
rules.remediation: Restrict Network ACL rules to only allow necessary traffic from known IP ranges.
